name: Stability Ball Leg Elevated Crunch
shortDescription: A crunch variation where the legs rest on a stability ball, increasing core engagement and instability.
instructions: Lie on your back with legs bent and calves resting on a stability ball, hands behind your head. Engage your core and lift your shoulders toward your knees, keeping your lower back on the floor, then return to the starting position.
steps: Place stability ball in front of you and sit down.
Lie back and position your calves and feet on top of the ball with knees bent.
Place your hands lightly behind your head or crossed on your chest.
Engage your core and curl your upper body toward your knees.
Pause briefly at the top, then lower back down without losing control.
formCues: Keep lower back pressed to floor
Do not pull with your neck
breathing: Exhale as you crunch up, inhale as you lower down.
